form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Fr1) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway, beaten 4.5 m by Benjamin (2:03.30) in NR up to 60 on April 4 at $18. Go well from the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung-in rounding the turns. Hung out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early speed at Bathurst, at the bell was 4th-17.61 beaten 18 m by Lochinvar Jag (2:03.80) in NR up to 68 on April 1 at $18. Two runs back 4th (Fr6) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst beaten 3 m by Allstarzzz Frankie (2:03.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 80 GH on March 25 at $9. Will not find this easy. Draws for a good showing.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr4) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 3rd-9.5 beaten 13 m by Helluva (2:01.80) in No NR on March 27 at $31. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr7) over 1609m at Menangle, at the bell was 9th-17.56 beaten 8 m by Michaywey (1:51.80) in NR up to 85 on March 21 at $61. Draws to make an impact.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway beaten 30 m by Sanchez (2:41.30) in 4-5yo No NR GH on March 27 at $151. At the start before game effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 2270m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was leading 1.8 beaten 1.3 m by Earl Of Pembroke (2:44.60) in NR up to 90 on March 20 at $2.70. Consider.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Riverina Paceway over 2270m NR 61 to 68 on March 13. Last start 11th (Fr1) over 2270m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway beaten 13 m by Seasider (2:40.20) in 4-5yo LR No NR GH on April 4 at $151. Will enjoy a class drop.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won three starts back at Riverina Paceway over 2270m NR 61 to 68 on March 13. Last start 11th (Fr1) over 2270m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway beaten 13 m by Seasider (2:40.20) in 4-5yo LR No NR GH on April 4 at $151. Will enjoy a class drop.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Fractious in the score up and out of position at the start.
Over-raced during the middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr6) over 1710m after being wide early at Goulburn was 2nd-3.4 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by The Greek General (2:02.80) in NR up to 80 on March 30 at $6.50. Can improve. Big chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr6) over 1710m after being wide early at Goulburn was 2nd-3.4 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by The Greek General (2:02.80) in NR up to 80 on March 30 at $6.50. Can improve. Big chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked between the 600m and the 400m behind the tiring Delightful Star.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr4) over 2300m at Menangle, beaten 30 m by Heeza Malteeza (2:43.00) in NR up to 80 on March 27 at $11. Before that, a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr8) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 6th-9.3 beaten 6 m by Earl Of Pembroke (2:44.60) in NR up to 90 on March 20 at $5. Race fit now and can measure up in this line up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced passing the 700m when Colossal Hope gave ground.

form.formComment: Good run when beaten by 3 m finishing third behind Dance With Carmer at Menangle over 1609m in a NR up to 85 on March 21 at $7. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind The Greek General at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 80 on March 30 at $1.90. Strong claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Forced wider at the 800m as a result of Siren Sea shifting ground.
